texto: When television is good nothing is better. But when television is bad nothing is worse. I invite you to sit down in front of your TV set and keep your eyes glued to that set until the station signs off. I can assure you that you will observe a vast wasteland.
explicacao: Citação de Newton Minow sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When television is good nothing is better. But when television is bad nothing is worse. I invite …” articula reflexao, television, nothing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
